7 AND 56

Applying to 11100101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 61 = AND(I 6,I 1) = AND(0,1) = 0
1 AND 70 = AND(I 7,I 0) = AND(1,1) = 1
2 AND 01 = AND(I 0,I 1) = AND(1,1) = 1
3 AND 12 = AND(I 1,I 2) = AND(1,1) = 1
4 AND 23 = AND(I 2,I 3) = AND(1,0) = 0
5 AND 34 = AND(I 3,I 4) = AND(0,0) = 0
6 AND 45 = AND(I 4,I 5) = AND(0,1) = 0
7 AND 56 = AND(I 5,I 6) = AND(1,0) = 0

\boxed{01110000}
